eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LAW ENFORCEMENT WARNING for the following counties or areas: Los Angeles; Orange; San Bernardino; San Diego; Riverside, CA; at 10:09 PM on JUN 22, 2019 Effective until 10:09 PM JUN 23, 2019. Message from WSLF/CAP.
